overall.description: First-person walking through a rainy cyberpunk city street at dusk, featuring neon-lit billboards, elevated highways, and futuristic architecture. The camera moves from an open street into a covered walkway beneath an overpass, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a high-density urban environment reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: speed limit 40 sign passes out of view on the right

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the wet road with headlights on

large concrete overpass structure spanning the street ahead
large digital billboard displaying PASSION advertisement on building facade
tall yellow illuminated advertisement panels on building
massive pink neon installation resembling a flower or brain on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk in an open cyberpunk city street. The scene features a speed limit 40 sign on the right, an elevated highway overpass ahead, and massive neon billboards including a prominent pink structure in the distance. Vehicles drive along the multi-lane road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching covered area under elevated highway

events.description: passing beneath the large pink neon structure overhead
white sports car passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk, approaching the large neon installation and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket and white shorts walking toward camera
person with red umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital screen wall displaying PASSION advertisement on right building

segments.scene_description: Approaching the massive pink neon installation which now dominates the center view. The camera passes beneath this structure while encountering more pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The elevated highway overpass looms closer ahead, and a white sports car passes by on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning under overpass with digital advertisements

events.description: entering covered area beneath elevated highway overpass
ambient light drops significantly as entering shadow of overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass into a more enclosed corridor with walls covered in digital displays and graffiti

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink jacket walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete underside of elevated highway forming a roof over the walkway
massive curved digital wall displaying scrolling pink and cyan neon text
vending machine with BURRITO XXL advertisement on the side
walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into the covered area beneath the elevated highway, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The concrete ceiling of the overpass blocks the sky, while a massive curved digital wall on the right displays scrolling neon text. The sidewalk shows debris and graffiti, and a vending machine becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor with shops and vending machines

events.description: passing red paper lanterns and neon-lit shop entrances

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow covered corridor lined with shops and neon signs, approaching a red lantern

entered.detail: storefronts with green neon OPEN signs and advertisements
traditional red paper lantern hanging from ceiling of walkway
external AC units mounted on building walls above shops

segments.scene_description: Deep within the covered corridor beneath the overpass, the scene features narrow walkways lined with shop fronts displaying neon signs. A traditional red paper lantern hangs ahead, contrasting with the cyberpunk aesthetic. External air conditioning units are visible on the right wall, and the vending machine moves to the right side as the camera progresses forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, neon-lit city street into the dark, enclosed corridors beneath a massive highway overpass. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, moving past a speed limit sign toward a towering pink neon installation and a distant overpass. As the camera passes beneath the glowing pink structure and weaves through oncoming pedestrians, a white sports car glides by on the rain-slicked pavement. The scene then shifts into the shadows of the elevated highway, where the sky is replaced by a concrete ceiling and a massive curved digital wall displaying scrolling neon text. Finally, the environment narrows into a covered corridor lined with graffiti, air conditioning units, and small shop fronts, passing a vending machine and a traditional red paper lantern.
